problem: What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost?
mechanism: Carbon nanotube alignment in polymer matrix
hypothesis: Combining Carbon nanotube alignment in polymer matrix with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
